notes: Identity is derived directly from Golem Attack visual-fix-v2 frame 000; no earlier Golem version is used.
The eight-frame idle uses restrained source-derived torso/shoulder deformation while the feet and y=601 opaque-pixel baseline remain fixed.
No attack, impactCue, slam, dust, VFX, shadow, scene, text, or baked locomotion is present.
CC must integrate this source set separately and test it at x4; no browser/x4 approval is claimed here.
